authority: Source-blocked active pregen combat style exceptions; not CSE promotions
policy: Combat Styles Encyclopedia remains the closed combat-style authority. These records document active RQG Starter Set pregen styles that are retained as narrative fixture exceptions because no CSE entry covers them. They must not be treated as verified CSE styles.
source: RQG Starter Set Pregen Folios PDF; narrative pregen source only, not vision-manifest promoted evidence.

exceptions.name: Grazelander Noble
exceptions.why_not_in_cse: Grazelander/Pure Horse culture is absent from the current Combat Styles Encyclopedia authority set; no verified CSE row covers Ionara as a mounted Pure Horse People priestess.
exceptions.nearest_cse_reason: No CSE culture matches Grazelander/Pure Horse.

exceptions.name: Colymar Bison Cavalry
exceptions.why_not_in_cse: No CSE entry covers this Sartarite/Colymar bison-mounted heavy cavalry kit. Praxian Bison is wrong culture and weapon set; Sartarite Hill Clan Levy lacks mounted combat and Battleaxe/Lance/Bison context.
exceptions.nearest_cse_reason: Hill Clan Levy is Sartarite but not mounted; Praxian Bison is mounted but wrong culture and kit.
